tea-n-more-san-diego.title: Boba Tea Social Club
tea-n-more-san-diego.vibe: Two-thousand-plus members meet roughly monthly at the shops orbiting Convoy, Tea N More on Clairemont Mesa Blvd among them.

one-zo-boba-irvine.title: Silent Book Club, Irvine
one-zo-boba-irvine.vibe: Order a drink at One Zo Boba, read silently for forty-five minutes alongside a few thousand fellow members, then talk about it. This is the rare club where showing up alone is the point.

almond-haus-garden-grove.title: The K-pop cupsleeve circuit
almond-haus-garden-grove.vibe: Fan-organized celebrations around idol birthdays and comebacks: collectible cup sleeves with any drink, artist alley, and raffles, rotating through boba shops across LA and OC.
almond-haus-garden-grove.cadence_text: Around idol birthdays and comebacks, no fixed schedule

sunright-tea-studio-irvine.title: Sunright Tea Studio collab meetups
sunright-tea-studio-irvine.vibe: The chain runs sanctioned crossovers, like Honkai Star Rail with voice actors and MapleStory pop-ups, that turn a store into a fan meetup for a weekend.
sunright-tea-studio-irvine.cadence_text: During official collab runs, check the collab page
